generated_assessment.reasoning: The baseline already aligns with the goal (oppose alliance commitment), so the attack reinforces rather than converts. This is a single brief T1 headline misframe, which typically produces small shifts. The profile's very high neuroticism (80th pct), especially anxiety (100th pct) and stress vulnerability (84th pct), makes her receptive to threat-salient, elite-distrust framing that deepens existing opposition, but the low openness (19th pct) and very low tender-mindedness (6th pct) mean she is not easily swayed by emotional appeals beyond confirming her own skepticism. The small 10-point movement reflects a slight hardening of her already negative stance rather than any substantive belief change.
